files. 

These claim lines are defined as those with a line BETOS code (BETOS_CD) where the first three digits 
are “D1A,” “D1B,” “D1C,” “D1D,” “D1E,” or “D1F.” The total Medicare payments are calculated as the 
sum of LINE_NCH_PMT_AMT where the LINE_PRCSG_IND_CD was “A,” “R,” or “S” — for all relevant 
lines. 

SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME: DME_MDCR_PMT 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 12 

SOURCE: CCW (derived) 

VALUES: —
